title: Space/set create: space name validated with canonicalize_display_name — 32 char limit is too restrictive for a space name
description: jmap.rs space_set create: space name is validated through canonicalize_display_name(), which caps at 32 Unicode scalars. This is the same function used for contact display names. A 32-character limit is reasonable for a person's nickname but quite short for a group space name (e.g., 'Engineering - Backend Infrastructure Team' is 41 chars). The display name validation is documented as matching relay/src/ws.rs:canonicalize_display_name, which is correct for person names, but space names are a different semantic concept. Suggested fix: add a separate canonicalize_space_name function with a higher cap (e.g. 128 chars).
